task_completion.description: Set the global font size of the document to 12pt.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The document text is visible in a word processor, and the font size indicator in the toolbar shows '12' when the text is selected or being edited.

task_completion.description: Format the scene heading ('ACT I') as Bold and Center aligned.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text 'ACT I' is positioned in the center of the page horizontally and appears thicker/darker (bolded) compared to normal text.

task_completion.description: Format the opening scene description paragraph as Italicized.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The block of text immediately following 'ACT I' (the scene setting/description) is slanted (italicized).

task_completion.description: Format all standalone Character Names ('LOPAKHIN', 'DUNYASHA') as Center aligned.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Character names that appear on their own lines just before their spoken dialogue are positioned in the center of the page.

task_completion.description: Format inline, bracketed stage directions as Italicized, leaving spoken dialogue Left aligned without bold or italics.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Text enclosed in brackets within the dialogue is slanted (italicized), while the actual spoken words remain normal (not bold, not italic) and are aligned to the left margin.

task_completion.description: Save the formatted document as a DOCX file named cherry_orchard_script.docx in the correct directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The word processor's title bar displays 'cherry_orchard_script.docx' or a 'Save As' dialog shows this exact filename being saved to the ~/Documents/TextDocuments/ directory.

integrity.description: The agent used a graphical word processor to format the document.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show a GUI word processor (like LibreOffice Writer) with formatting toolbars, rather than a terminal window or a plain text editor (like nano or gedit).

integrity.description: The agent applied actual rich-text formatting rather than typing markdown or HTML tags.
integrity.visual_evidence: Formatting is rendered visually (actual bolding, actual centering) and applied via UI buttons or shortcuts, not by typing symbols like '**ACT I**' or '<center>' into the text.

integrity.description: The document contains the actual text of The Cherry Orchard.
integrity.visual_evidence: The text visible in the document matches the play The Cherry Orchard (mentioning characters like Lopakhin and Dunyasha) and was not replaced with dummy text.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The raw input file is located at /home/ga/Documents/TextDocuments/cherry_orchard_raw.txt. The expected output must be saved exactly as /home/ga/Documents/TextDocuments/cherry_orchard_script.docx.
